description: Microsoft Graph API permission risk classification matrix for app registration approval workflow

HIGH.description: Permissions ending in .All that grant broad access across all resources

MEDIUM.description: Application permissions (app-only) without .All suffix - operates without user context

LOW.description: Delegated permissions without .All suffix - limited by signed-in user's permissions
LOW.blast_radius_note: ⚠️ Operates in user context - limited by signed-in user's permissions

well_known_high_risk_permissions.name: Application.ReadWrite.All
well_known_high_risk_permissions.blast_radius: Can modify any application in the directory

well_known_high_risk_permissions.name: Application.ReadWrite.All
well_known_high_risk_permissions.blast_radius: Can modify applications the user has access to

well_known_high_risk_permissions.name: AppRoleAssignment.ReadWrite.All
well_known_high_risk_permissions.description: Manage app permission grants and app role assignments
well_known_high_risk_permissions.blast_radius: Can grant ANY permission to ANY application - ultimate privilege escalation

well_known_high_risk_permissions.name: AppRoleAssignment.ReadWrite.All
well_known_high_risk_permissions.description: Manage app permission grants and app role assignments (delegated)
well_known_high_risk_permissions.blast_radius: Can grant permissions the user has authority to manage

well_known_high_risk_permissions.name: Calendars.ReadWrite.All
well_known_high_risk_permissions.description: Read and write calendars in all mailboxes
well_known_high_risk_permissions.blast_radius: Can read, create, modify, and delete calendar events for all users

well_known_high_risk_permissions.name: Calendars.ReadWrite.All
well_known_high_risk_permissions.blast_radius: Can manage calendars the user has access to

well_known_high_risk_permissions.name: Contacts.ReadWrite.All
well_known_high_risk_permissions.description: Read and write contacts in all mailboxes
well_known_high_risk_permissions.blast_radius: Can read and modify all users' contact information

well_known_high_risk_permissions.name: Contacts.ReadWrite.All
well_known_high_risk_permissions.blast_radius: Can manage contacts the user has access to

well_known_high_risk_permissions.name: Directory.AccessAsUser.All
well_known_high_risk_permissions.description: Access directory as the signed-in user
well_known_high_risk_permissions.blast_radius: Can perform any directory operation the signed-in user can perform - impersonation risk

well_known_high_risk_permissions.name: Directory.Read.All
well_known_high_risk_permissions.blast_radius: Can read ALL users, groups, applications, devices, and directory objects

well_known_high_risk_permissions.name: Directory.Read.All
well_known_high_risk_permissions.blast_radius: Can read directory objects the user has access to

well_known_high_risk_permissions.name: Directory.ReadWrite.All
well_known_high_risk_permissions.blast_radius: Can modify any directory object including users, groups, devices - full tenant control

well_known_high_risk_permissions.name: Directory.ReadWrite.All
well_known_high_risk_permissions.blast_radius: Can modify directory objects the user has access to

well_known_high_risk_permissions.name: Files.ReadWrite.All
well_known_high_risk_permissions.description: Read and write files in all site collections
well_known_high_risk_permissions.blast_radius: Can access and modify any file in SharePoint/OneDrive across entire tenant

well_known_high_risk_permissions.name: Files.ReadWrite.All
well_known_high_risk_permissions.description: Read and write files in all site collections (delegated)
well_known_high_risk_permissions.blast_radius: Can manage files the user has access to

well_known_high_risk_permissions.name: Group.ReadWrite.All
well_known_high_risk_permissions.blast_radius: Can create, modify, delete any group including security and M365 groups

well_known_high_risk_permissions.name: Group.ReadWrite.All
well_known_high_risk_permissions.blast_radius: Can manage groups the user has access to

well_known_high_risk_permissions.name: Mail.ReadWrite.All
well_known_high_risk_permissions.description: Read and write mail in all mailboxes
well_known_high_risk_permissions.blast_radius: Can read and send email as any user - data exfiltration and phishing risk

well_known_high_risk_permissions.name: Mail.ReadWrite.All
well_known_high_risk_permissions.blast_radius: Can read and modify mail the user has access to

well_known_high_risk_permissions.name: RoleManagement.ReadWrite.Directory
well_known_high_risk_permissions.blast_radius: Can assign any role to any principal including Global Administrator - complete tenant takeover

well_known_high_risk_permissions.name: RoleManagement.ReadWrite.Directory
well_known_high_risk_permissions.blast_radius: Can manage role assignments the user has authority over

well_known_high_risk_permissions.name: Sites.ReadWrite.All
well_known_high_risk_permissions.description: Read and write items in all site collections
well_known_high_risk_permissions.blast_radius: Can modify any SharePoint site content across entire tenant

well_known_high_risk_permissions.name: Sites.ReadWrite.All
well_known_high_risk_permissions.description: Read and write items in all site collections (delegated)
well_known_high_risk_permissions.blast_radius: Can manage SharePoint sites the user has access to

well_known_high_risk_permissions.name: User.ReadWrite.All
well_known_high_risk_permissions.description: Read and write all users' full profiles
well_known_high_risk_permissions.blast_radius: Can modify any user profile, reset passwords, assign licenses

well_known_high_risk_permissions.name: User.ReadWrite.All
well_known_high_risk_permissions.description: Read and write all users' full profiles (delegated)
well_known_high_risk_permissions.blast_radius: Can modify user profiles the signed-in user has access to

notes: Application permissions (Role) generally have larger blast radius than Delegated (Scope) permissions
Any permission ending in .All should be classified as HIGH risk regardless of type
Delegated permissions without .All are LOW risk due to user context limitations
Application permissions without .All are MEDIUM risk as they operate without user context
HIGH risk permissions always require 100-character minimum justification
All permission requests must be validated against the official Microsoft Graph permissions reference
